help_dialog.title: Need Help Signing Up?
help_dialog.step1_text: Fill in your first name, last name, email, and phone number (10 digits).
help_dialog.step2_text: Your password must be at least 8 characters long and include: 1 Uppercase, 1 Lowercase, 1 Number, and 1 Special character (e.g., @$!%*?&).
help_dialog.step3_text: After submitting, a verification link will be sent to your email. Check your Inbox or Spam folder and click the link to activate your account.
